did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is an editorial that critically analyzes and summarizes findings from a systematic review of existing deep learning models (Choy et al.) regarding their diagnostic accuracy for skin diseases. It does not present original research where the authors developed or applied AI models to obtain new study results; rather, it discusses the state of the field, bias, and applicability of previously reported AI models.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
